---
name: Bug report
about: Report incorrect behavior, regression, or semantic mismatch
title: "[bug] "
labels: ["bug"]
---

## Summary

Describe the problem plainly.

## Persona

Which perspective found this?

- [ ] admin
- [ ] operator
- [ ] user
- [ ] exec

## Surface

Which surface is affected?

- [ ] admin
- [ ] operator
- [ ] sdk/http
- [ ] demo/docs
- [ ] security

## Expected behavior

What should have happened instead?

## Actual behavior

What happened in practice?

## Exact command or workflow

Provide the exact command, script, notebook path, UI flow, or operator workflow.

## Reproduction

Provide the smallest reproducible case you can, including inputs and cut points when relevant.

## Cut / element / artifact path

If this involves replay, proofs, reports, demos, or packaged artifacts, record
the exact cut, element, tuple, file, page, or artifact path.

## Semantic impact

Does this affect determinism, replay, provenance, rule evaluation, or API boundaries?

## Observed severity

- [ ] critical
- [ ] high
- [ ] medium
- [ ] low
- [ ] observational

## Environment

- OS:
- Rust toolchain:
- Relevant command(s):
- Relevant artifact(s):

## Additional context

Logs, stack traces, screenshots, or links are welcome if they sharpen the report.
